stories.title: World Cup live updates: USA keeps pressure on, ext...
Clark sets 36-hole U.S. Open Shinnecock record
stories.summary: Wyndham Clark followed up a 6-under 64 on Thursday with a 1-under 69 Friday on his way to breaking the 36-hole scoring record for a U.S. Open at Shinnecock.

stories.title: 5-star CB John Meredith III commits to Texas
stories.summary: Five-star prospect John Meredith III, ESPN's No. 1 cornerback in the 2027 class, announced his commitment to Texas.

stories.title: Toews, Stanley Cup and Olympic champ, retires
stories.summary: Jonathan Toews, a three-time Stanley Cup champion with the Blackhawks and two-time Olympic gold medalist with Canada, has announced his retirement.

stories.title: Green Bay's Gottlieb extended through 2030-31
stories.summary: Green Bay coach Doug Gottlieb has agreed to a contract extension that takes his deal through the 2030-31 season.
